description: A virtual file system server providing comprehensive file and directory operations including navigation, creation, reading, writing, searching, and manipulation of files and directories within a simulated file system environment.

tools.name: pwd
tools.description: Return the current working directory path in the virtual file system.

current_working_directory.description: The current working directory path in the virtual file system (e.g., "/" or "/home/user").

tools.name: ls
tools.description: List the contents of the current directory in the virtual file system.

a.description: If true, show hidden files and directories (those starting with '.'). Defaults to false.

current_directory_content.description: A list of file and directory names in the current directory.

tools.name: cd
tools.description: Change the current working directory to the specified folder. Only single-level navigation is supported (cannot use paths).

folder.description: The name of the folder or directory to change to. Use ".." to go to parent directory. Only single folder names are supported, not full paths.

tools.name: mkdir
tools.description: Create a new directory in the current directory of the virtual file system.

dir_name.description: The name of the new directory to create in the current directory. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

tools.name: touch
tools.description: Create a new empty file of any extension in the current directory of the virtual file system.

file_name.description: The name of the new file to create in the current directory. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

tools.name: echo
tools.description: Write content to a file at the current directory or display it in the terminal if no file name is provided.

content.description: The text content to write to the file or display in the terminal.

file_name.description: Optional name of the file in the current directory to write the content to. If not provided, content is displayed in terminal.

tools.name: cat
tools.description: Display the contents of a file of any extension from the current directory in the virtual file system.

file_name.description: The name of the file from the current directory to display. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

file_content.description: The complete content of the file.

tools.name: find
tools.description: Find any files or directories under a specific path that contain the specified name pattern in their file or directory name.

path.description: The directory path to start the search from. Defaults to current directory ('.').

name.description: Optional name pattern to search for. If provided, only files and directories containing this pattern in their name will be returned. If not provided, all items are returned.

matches.description: A list of matching file and directory paths found during the recursive search.

tools.name: wc
tools.description: Count the number of lines, words, or characters in a file from the current directory.

file_name.description: The name of the file in the current directory to perform word count operation on. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

mode.description: Mode of operation: 'l' for counting lines, 'w' for counting words, 'c' for counting characters. Defaults to 'l'.

count.description: The count of lines, words, or characters in the file based on the specified mode.

type.description: The type of unit being counted: 'lines', 'words', or 'characters'.

tools.name: sort
tools.description: Sort the contents of a file line by line in alphabetical order.

file_name.description: The name of the file in the current directory to sort. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

sorted_content.description: The sorted content of the file with lines arranged in alphabetical order.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search for lines in a file that contain the specified pattern string.

file_name.description: The name of the file in the current directory to search. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

pattern.description: The text pattern to search for within the file lines.

matching_lines.description: A list of lines from the file that contain the specified pattern.

tools.name: du
tools.description: Estimate the disk usage of the current directory and all its contents in the virtual file system.

human_readable.description: If true, returns the disk usage in human-readable format (e.g., '1.5 KB', '2.3 MB'). If false, returns size in bytes. Defaults to false.

disk_usage.description: The estimated disk usage of the directory and its contents, either in bytes or human-readable format depending on the human_readable parameter.

tools.name: tail
tools.description: Display the last part of a file from the current directory, showing the specified number of lines from the end.

file_name.description: The name of the file in the current directory to display. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

lines.description: The number of lines to display from the end of the file. Defaults to 10.

last_lines.description: The last N lines of the file, joined by newline characters.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Compare two files line by line at the current directory and return the differences between them.

file_name1.description: The name of the first file in the current directory to compare. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

file_name2.description: The name of the second file in the current directory to compare. Must not contain invalid characters (|/\?%*:"><).

diff_lines.description: The differences between the two files, showing lines that differ with '-' prefix for file1 and '+' prefix for file2.

tools.name: mv
tools.description: Move a file or directory from one location to another within the current directory. Paths are not allowed in destination, only file or folder names.

source.description: The name of the source file or directory in the current directory to move.

destination.description: The destination name to move the file or directory to. If destination exists and is a directory, the source will be moved into it. Otherwise, source will be renamed to destination. Paths are not allowed, only file or folder names.

tools.name: rm
tools.description: Remove a file or directory from the current directory in the virtual file system.

file_name.description: The name of the file or directory in the current directory to remove.

tools.name: rmdir
tools.description: Remove an empty directory from the current directory in the virtual file system.

dir_name.description: The name of the empty directory in the current directory to remove.

tools.name: cp
tools.description: Copy a file or directory from one location to another within the current directory. Paths are not allowed in destination, only file or folder names.

source.description: The name of the source file or directory in the current directory to copy.

destination.description: The destination name to copy the file or directory to. If destination exists and is a directory, the source will be copied into it. Otherwise, source will be copied and renamed to destination. Paths are not allowed, only file or folder names.
